scripts.test: turbo run test && vitest run tests/infrastructure/
scripts.test:coverage: for pkg in packages/core packages/react packages/browser packages/shared; do pnpm --dir "$pkg" run test:coverage; done
scripts.test:package-quality: pnpm -r build && pnpm dlx publint packages/core packages/react packages/browser packages/shared && pnpm dlx @arethetypeswrong/cli --pack --profile node16 packages/core && pnpm dlx @arethetypeswrong/cli --pack --profile node16 --exclude-entrypoints=./styles.css packages/react && pnpm dlx @arethetypeswrong/cli --pack --profile node16 --exclude-entrypoints=./styles.css packages/browser && pnpm dlx @arethetypeswrong/cli --pack --profile node16 packages/shared && mkdir -p .tmp/packs && find .tmp/packs -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type f -delete && for pkg in packages/core packages/react packages/browser packages/shared; do pnpm --dir "$pkg" pack --pack-destination ../../.tmp/packs; done
